title: ocimum basilicum var. pilosum
intro: Ocimum basilicum var. pilosum, also known as hairy basil, is a variety of the Ocimum basilicum plant species that is characterized by its soft and fuzzy leaves. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Ocimum basilicum var. pilosum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Ocimum basilicum var. pilosum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
